verses.text: Grace and peace through knowing God; He has given 'exceeding great and precious promises,' that we 'be partakers of the divine nature,' escaping corruption. Precious promises. God's promises lift us into His own life.

Grace and peace through knowing God; He has given 'exceeding great and precious promises,' that we 'be partakers of the divine nature,' escaping corruption. Precious promises. God's promises lift us into His own life.

Add to faith virtue, knowledge, temperance, patience, godliness, brotherly kindness, charity. Grow in grace. Faith is to ripen into a ladder of virtues.
Add to faith virtue, knowledge, temperance, patience, godliness, brotherly kindness, charity. Grow in grace. Faith is to ripen into a ladder of virtues.
Add to faith virtue, knowledge, temperance, patience, godliness, brotherly kindness, charity. Grow in grace. Faith is to ripen into a ladder of virtues.
If these abound, you are fruitful; he that lacks them is blind; give diligence to 'make your calling and election sure.' Be diligent. Fruitfulness confirms a true calling.
If these abound, you are fruitful; he that lacks them is blind; give diligence to 'make your calling and election sure.' Be diligent. Fruitfulness confirms a true calling.

If these abound, you are fruitful; he that lacks them is blind; give diligence to 'make your calling and election sure.' Be diligent. Fruitfulness confirms a true calling.
Peter, knowing his death is near, will stir them up by remembrance while he lives. Faithful reminder. He labours that they remember after he is gone.

We followed no 'cunningly devised fables,' but 'were eyewitnesses of his majesty' on the holy mount, hearing the Father's voice. Eyewitness. The gospel rests on what they saw and heard.

We have 'a more sure word of prophecy'; know that 'no prophecy... is of any private interpretation,' but men spoke 'moved by the Holy Ghost.' God's word. Scripture came by the Spirit, not man's will.
